'''âzh-m-g''' ('''kazhamag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:poker|poker]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-m-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:poker|poker]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âzh-m-g
|-
! Lemma
| kazhamag
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhamag|thizhamag]] || [[word:jizhamag|jizhamag]] || [[word:shizhamag|shizhamag]] || [[word:kizhamag|kizhamag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhamag|thuthuzhamag]] || [[word:jujuzhamag|jujuzhamag]] || [[word:shushuzhamag|shushuzhamag]] || [[word:kukuzhamag|kukuzhamag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzhamag|thuzhamag]] || [[word:juzhamag|juzhamag]] || [[word:shuzhamag|shuzhamag]] || [[word:kuzhamag|kuzhamag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzhamag|thuzhamag]] || [[word:juzhamag|juzhamag]] || [[word:shuzhamag|shuzhamag]] || [[word:kuzhamag|kuzhamag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezhamag|thezhamag]] || [[word:jezhamag|jezhamag]] || [[word:shezhamag|shezhamag]] || [[word:kezhamag|kezhamag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozhamag|thothozhamag]] || [[word:jojozhamag|jojozhamag]] || [[word:shoshozhamag|shoshozhamag]] || [[word:kokozhamag|kokozhamag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozhamag|thozhamag]] || [[word:jozhamag|jozhamag]] || [[word:shozhamag|shozhamag]] || [[word:kozhamag|kozhamag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhamag|thozhamag]] || [[word:jozhamag|jozhamag]] || [[word:shozhamag|shozhamag]] || [[word:kozhamag|kozhamag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzhamag|thĂŠzhamag]] || [[word:jĂŠzhamag|jĂŠzhamag]] || [[word:shĂŠzhamag|shĂŠzhamag]] || [[word:kĂŠzhamag|kĂŠzhamag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazhamag|thathazhamag]] || [[word:jajazhamag|jajazhamag]] || [[word:shashazhamag|shashazhamag]] || [[word:kakazhamag|kakazhamag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhamag|thazhamag]] || [[word:jazhamag|jazhamag]] || [[word:shazhamag|shazhamag]] || [[word:kazhamag|kazhamag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhamag|thazhamag]] || [[word:jazhamag|jazhamag]] || [[word:shazhamag|shazhamag]] || [[word:kazhamag|kazhamag]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazhamag|shazhamag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazhamag|goshazhamag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazhamag|gokishazhamag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazhamagnĂŒ|shazhamagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazhamagnknĂŒ|goshazhamagnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhamagnĂŒ|gokishazhamagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazhamagshĂ«|shazhamagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazhamagnkshĂ«|goshazhamagnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazhamagshĂ«|gokishazhamagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhamagro|shazhamagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhamagnkro|goshazhamagnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhamagro|gokishazhamagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhamagmu|shazhamagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhamagnkmu|goshazhamagnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhamagmu|gokishazhamagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazhamagsher|shazhamagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazhamagnksher|goshazhamagnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazhamagsher|gokishazhamagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazhamagng|shazhamagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazhamagnkng|goshazhamagnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazhamagng|gokishazhamagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazhamagya|shazhamagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazhamagnkya|goshazhamagnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazhamagya|gokishazhamagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazhamagyam|shazhamagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazhamagnkyam|goshazhamagnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazhamagyam|gokishazhamagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhamagnĂŒshĂ«|shazhamagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhamagnknĂŒshĂ«|goshazhamagnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhamagnĂŒshĂ«|gokishazhamagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhamagnĂŒro|shazhamagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhamagnknĂŒro|goshazhamagnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhamagnĂŒro|gokishazhamagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhamagnĂŒmu|shazhamagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhamagnknĂŒmu|goshazhamagnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhamagnĂŒmu|gokishazhamagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhamagshĂ«nĂŒ|shazhamagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhamagnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazhamagnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhamagshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazhamagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhamagshĂ«ro|shazhamagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhamagnkshĂ«ro|goshazhamagnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhamagshĂ«ro|gokishazhamagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhamagshĂ«mu|shazhamagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhamagnkshĂ«mu|goshazhamagnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhamagshĂ«mu|gokishazhamagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhamagronĂŒ|shazhamagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhamagnkronĂŒ|goshazhamagnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhamagronĂŒ|gokishazhamagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhamagroshĂ«|shazhamagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhamagnkroshĂ«|goshazhamagnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhamagroshĂ«|gokishazhamagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhamagromu|shazhamagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhamagnkromu|goshazhamagnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhamagromu|gokishazhamagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhamagmunĂŒ|shazhamagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhamagnkmunĂŒ|goshazhamagnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhamagmunĂŒ|gokishazhamagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhamagmushĂ«|shazhamagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhamagnkmushĂ«|goshazhamagnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhamagmushĂ«|gokishazhamagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhamagmuro|shazhamagmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhamagnkmuro|goshazhamagnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhamagmuro|gokishazhamagmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
